name: sci-research
description: Three independent multi-agent pipelines for daily news intelligence, multi-country branded briefings, and company reputation tracking. Codex-native port: skills orchestrate TOML subagents in .codex/agents/, with per-URL date verification, T1-T4 source grading, editorial-desk filtering, Fact Manifest discipline, and PreToolUse/PostToolUse quality hooks.

interface.shortDescription: Daily news intelligence, branded briefings, and reputation monitoring
interface.longDescription: Three independent pipelines: /daily-news-intelligence (dated single-country briefing, mono- or bilingual, T1-T4 date-verified), /daily-briefing (multi-country branded SPD Bank Word doc), and /reputation-track (company adverse-media + social monitoring, HTML email only when negative). Each skill orchestrates a chain of native TOML subagents in .codex/agents/.
defaultPrompt: Generate a daily news intelligence report for Japan
Create a branded briefing from daily news reports
Monitor a company for reputational risk
